label_policy.relevant: The title and abstract directly address the question.
label_policy.partially_relevant: The paper shares a subtopic but cannot directly answer the question.
label_policy.irrelevant: Any corpus paper not listed for that question.
label_policy.answerable: At least one directly relevant paper exists in the current corpus.

questions.query: Agent 在长任务中如何避免遗忘重要状态？
questions.rationale: 2607.08716 directly studies behavioral state decay and proactive memory intervention; 2607.08252 discusses long-term persona state but not general task-memory retrieval.

questions.query: 多 Agent 如何通过递归委派完成深度和广度兼顾的网页搜索？
questions.rationale: 2607.08662 directly proposes recursive multi-agent delegation for deep-and-wide web search.

questions.query: 博弈论驱动的多 Agent 框架能否减少科学领域语言模型幻觉？
questions.rationale: 2607.08403 directly evaluates a game-theoretic multi-agent framework for hallucination reduction; 2607.08288 discusses grounded compliance and residual hallucination risk without the same method.

questions.query: MCP Agent 如何把关键基础设施文档转换成可审计的持续合规材料？
questions.rationale: 2607.08288 directly describes an MCP-grounded pipeline that produces knowledge graphs and NIST OSCAL artifacts.

questions.query: 网页 Agent 如何防御跨站提示词注入并限制不可信页面内容的权限？
questions.rationale: 2607.08147 directly presents contextual least privilege and confinement for web-agent prompt injection; 2607.08180 concerns content protection against agentic crawlers.

questions.query: 多 Agent 系统执行失败后，如何定位负责的 Agent 和最早出错步骤？
questions.rationale: 2607.07989 directly studies agent-level and step-level failure localization.

questions.query: 如何为自主 Agent 建设带来源引用和质量门控的大规模技能库？
questions.rationale: 2607.07676 directly presents a source-grounded skill library, acquisition pipeline, quality gate, and offline search bundles.

questions.query: 企业 LLM Agent 如何把提示词原型改造成可审计、可验证的工程系统？
questions.rationale: 2607.08028 directly studies code-owned contracts, schemas, validators, traces, and model substitution in enterprise agents.

questions.query: Agentic RAG 在保险自动核保中相比普通 RAG 有什么优势？
questions.rationale: 2607.07858 directly compares a single LLM, naive RAG, and an Agentic RAG underwriting pipeline.

questions.query: 部署规则如何因果影响多 Agent 系统的集体安全行为？
questions.rationale: 2607.07695 directly holds agents and tasks fixed while varying deployment rules to measure causal safety effects.

questions.query: LangGraph 和 CrewAI 在循环控制上的主要区别是什么？
questions.rationale: The current corpus contains no direct comparison of LangGraph and CrewAI.

questions.query: MCP 协议最初由谁提出，它的标准消息格式是什么？
questions.rationale: 2607.08288 uses MCP in an application pipeline but does not establish the protocol's origin or full message specification.

questions.query: ChromaDB、Milvus 和 Weaviate 在百万级向量检索中的性能差异是什么？
questions.rationale: The current corpus has no direct vector-database benchmark or comparison.
